Open Legal Systems Project

Open-source tools for legal aid systems

We build practical civic-tech infrastructure that improves legal aid operations and structural efficiency.

Browse Projects Contribute

Scroll to explore ↓

What is the Open Legal Systems Project?

The Open Legal Systems Project (OLSP) is a public-interest engineering initiative focused on open, reusable legal-aid tooling. Volunteers and domain practitioners collaborate to ship practical tools for intake, communications, and case preparation.
